metadata.title: Pool of Bethesda Dental Clinic — Douala
metadata.description: Modern, precise and personalized dental care in a welcoming, safe environment equipped with the latest technology.

hero.title: Your smile deserves the best care.
hero.subtitle: Modern, precise and personalized dental care in a welcoming, safe environment equipped with the latest technology.

items.title: Professionalism

items.title: Hygiene
items.description: Strict sterilization protocols for your complete safety.

items.title: Listening
items.description: Every patient is heard, understood and supported.

items.title: Excellence

about.title: Meet Dr. Myriam Kengne
about.description: A passionate, attentive professional committed to providing quality care in a modern environment.
about.quote: Every smile is unique. Our mission is to restore its confidence and brightness.

steps.title: Choose your care
